data.html:
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import { 
  TrendingUp, Search, Filter, Star, Users, Target, 
  CheckCircle, ChevronDown, SlidersHorizontal, X, Bell
} from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from '@/components/ui/avatar';
import { initializeDemoData, providerStorage, userStorage } from '@/lib/signal-storage';
import { ProviderProfile } from '@/lib/signal-types';

export default function ProvidersPage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [mounted, setMounted] = useState(false);
  const [providers, setProviders] = useState([]);
  const [filteredProviders, setFilteredProviders] = useState([]);
  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState<'winRate' | 'subscribers' | 'rating'>('winRate');
  const [filterPair, setFilterPair] = useState('all');
  const [filterTier, setFilterTier] = useState('all');
  const [showFilters, setShowFilters] = useState(false);
  const [user, setUser] = useState(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    setMounted(true);
    initializeDemoData();
    const providersList = providerStorage.getActive();
    setProviders(providersList);
    setFilteredProviders(providersList);
    setUser(userStorage.getCurrentUser());
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    let result = [...providers];

    // Search filter
    if (search) {
      result = result.filter(p => 
        p.displayName.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) ||
        p.pairs.some(pair => pair.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()))
      );
    }

    // Pair filter
    if (filterPair !== 'all') {
      result = result.filter(p => p.pairs.includes(filterPair));
    }

    // Tier filter
    if (filterTier !== 'all') {
      result = result.filter(p => p.tier === filterTier);
    }

    // Sort
    result.sort((a, b) => {
      if (sortBy === 'winRate') return b.winRate - a.winRate;
      if (sortBy === 'subscribers') return b.activeSubscribers - a.activeSubscribers;
      if (sortBy === 'rating') return b.averageRating - a.averageRating;
      return 0;
    });

    setFilteredProviders(result);
  }, [search, sortBy, filterPair, filterTier, providers]);

  if (!mounted) return null;

  const allPairs = [...new Set(providers.flatMap(p => p.pairs))];

  return (
    

      {/* Navigation */}
      

        

          

            
              

                
              

              PipTray
            
            
            

              Providers
              Signals
            

            
            

              {user ? (
                
                  
                
              ) : (
                <>
                  
                    
                  
                  
                    
                  
                
              )}
            

          

        

      


      

        {/* Header */}
        

          
Signal Providers

          
Browse verified providers with real performance data

        


        {/* Search and Filters */}
        

          

            {/* Search */}
            

              
               setSearch(e.target.value)}
              />
            

            
            {/* Sort */}
            

              Sort by:
              
            

            
            {/* Filter Toggle */}
            
          

          
          {/* Expanded Filters */}
          {showFilters && (
            
              

                

                  
                  
                

                

                  
                  
                

              

            
          )}
        


        {/* Results Count */}
        

          

            Showing {filteredProviders.length} providers
          

        


        {/* Providers Grid */}
        

          {filteredProviders.map((provider, i) => (
            
              
            
          ))}
        


        {filteredProviders.length === 0 && (
          

            
            
No providers found

            
Try adjusting your search or filters

          

        )}
      

    

  );
}

// Provider Card Component
function ProviderCard({ provider }: { provider: ProviderProfile }) {
  const tierColors: Record = {
    new: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600',
    registered: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-600',
    verified: 'bg-green-100 text-green-600',
    top: 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-600',
    elite: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-600',
  };
  
  const tierIcons: Record = {
    new: '🔰',
    registered: '📝',
    verified: '✅',
    top: '🏆',
    elite: '💎',
  };

  return (
    
      
        {/* Header */}
        

          

            

              
                
                
                  {provider.displayName.charAt(0)}
                
              
              

                
{provider.displayName}

                
                  {tierIcons[provider.tier]} {provider.tier.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + provider.tier.slice(1)}
                
              

            

          

          
          
{provider.bio}

          
          {/* Pairs */}
          

            {provider.pairs.slice(0, 4).map(pair => (
              {pair}
            ))}
            {provider.pairs.length > 4 && (
              +{provider.pairs.length - 4}
            )}
          

        

        
        {/* Stats */}
        

          

            
{provider.winRate}%

            
Win Rate

          

          

            
{provider.totalPips}

            
Pips

          

          

            
{provider.totalSignals}

            
Signals

          

        

        
        {/* Price & CTA */}
        

          

            

              UGX {provider.monthlyPrice.toLocaleString()}
              /month
            

            

              
              {provider.averageRating}
              ({provider.totalReviews})
            

          

          
            
          
        

      
    
  );
}
